programs.title: BattleBots
programs.desc: US robot combat series. The quest this time is to beat Desperado champion Lock-Jaw, but eight bots must first fight to the death in the second Sin City Slugfest.

programs.title: ITV Racing: Live from Chester
programs.desc: Francesca Cumani and Ed Chamberlin present live coverage of racing from Chester on the Opening Day of the May meeting.

programs.title: World of Sport
programs.desc: TV Firsts: Richard Henwood takes a look back at some television sporting firsts that include a 14-year-old Ronnie O'Sullivan.

programs.title: The Protectors
programs.desc: Adventure series. The Protectors are hired by the West German government to find the operator of a Nazi pension fund for five ex-Nazis wanted for war crimes.

programs.title: The Sweeney
programs.desc: Tough '70s police series. Regan gets involved in gangland warfare following the death of one of London's leading villains.

programs.title: Minder
programs.desc: Light-hearted drama series about a loveable rogue. Arthur receives a couple of interesting propositions while attending Charlie Johnson's funeral.
